title: Amtech G4360 1.5 inch Paint Brush (38mm), No Bristle Loss design, Soft Grip and available as 0.5”, 1”, 2”, 2.5”, 3” and 4”, Multi-Colour
features: NO BRISTLE LOSS: This 38mm (1.5") paint brush has a no bristle loss design for a smooth finish
GOOD COVERAGE: It has a tapered synthetic filament which for excellent paint pickup, coverage and offload
VERSATILE AND COMFORTABLE TO USE: The brush has a comfortable, soft handle and is suitable for use with emulsion, varnish and oil-based paints
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech has a fantastic range of essential DIY tools for all your decorating and household needs. Our range of good quality tapered synthetic filament paint brushes are available in seven different sizes, including 12mm/0.5”, 25mm/1”, 38mm/1.5”, 50mm/2”, 63mm/2.5”, 75mm/3” and 100mm/4”. The thickness and length of the filament is designed for great paint pick-up and effective paint coverage. Amtech’s great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
